lines.text: Declares all component tokens for links components like `OUDSSkeleton`
Declares all component tokens for chips components like `OUDSChip`
Declares all component tokens for components using control item layout like `OUDSSwitch`, `OUDSCheckboxItem` and `OUDSRadioButton`
Declares all component tokens for divider components like `OUDSDivider`
Declares all component tokens for links components like `OUDSInputText`
Declares all component tokens for links components like `OUDSLink`
Declares all component tokens for list item components like `OUDSListItem`
Declares all component tokens for links components like `OUDSSelect`
Declares all component tokens for radio button components like `OUDSRadioButton` and `OUDSRadioButtonItem`.
Declares all component tokens for links components like `OUDSBadge`
Declares all component tokens for tags components like `OUDSTag`
Declares all component tokens for links components like `OUDSBulletList`
Declares all component tokens for buttons components like `OUDSButton`
Declares all component tokens for switch components like `OUDSSwitch`
Declares all component tokens for checkboxes components like `OUDSCheckbox` and `OUDSCheckboxItem`.
